title: StatusMapping
description: Declared dict[str, str] from arcane legacy status codes to human-readable labels (FR-003, US3). Extending coverage is a one-line edit to the 'entries' object; no other artifact changes (US3-AS2). The literal 'unknown' is reserved as the miss-path marker and MUST NOT appear as a value.

entries.description: raw_code -> human_label. Keys match the legacy encoding exactly (case-sensitive). Values are human-readable strings — never further codes.

unknown_marker.description: Constant sentinel used as NormalizedPayload.status.code when a lookup misses.
